title: Local contact aliases
description: Allow labeling a pub_id locally without requiring that peer to /iam. Store in contacts.json (infrastructure already exists in config.rs). Wire the alias into display_name() so locally-named contacts show their alias in chat.
close_reason: implemented in cli/src/commands.rs: /who, /me (CTCP ACTION), /cat (4KB text file), /! (shell stdout), /alias (contacts.json persistence), /clear; Ctrl+L handled natively by rustyline
